title: Master of Technology in Computer Science Engineering (Cyber Security) - For Working Professionals Only
content: The Master of Technology in CSE-Cyber Security program for Working Professionals at the School of Computer Science & Engineering is specially designed to cater to the academic advancement of individuals already engaged in full-time employment in the technical or engineering sector. Recognized by regulatory bodies and aligned with UGC guidelines, the program enables working professionals to pursue a master degree without interrupting their current career paths. The program follows a weekend schedule (Saturday & Sunday) along with few evening classes, making it flexible and accessible. The Master of Technology in CSE–Cyber Security at the School of Computer Science & Engineering is a two-year, full-time postgraduate program designed to develop advanced expertise in securing digital infrastructure, systems, and data. This learner-centric, industry-relevant, and research-focused program prepares students to tackle complex cyber threats through a comprehensive understanding of security principles and cutting-edge technologies. The curriculum combines core computer science fundamentals with specialized courses in areas such as cryptography, network security, ethical hacking, digital forensics, cloud security, and secure software development. A significant project or dissertation component enables students to apply their knowledge to real-world security challenges and contribute to innovative solutions. This program is ideal for engineering graduates aiming to build a strong career in cybersecurity roles across industries, government agencies, and research institutions. It equips students with the skills and mindset required to protect digital assets and ensure the resilience of critical systems in an increasingly connected world. 01 02 An ability to write and present a substantial technical report/document. 03 01 02 03 01 Have the ability to work with emerging technologies in computing requisite to Industry 4.0. 02
